overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (Mafia III) depicting a character in a black leather jacket walking through a 1960s suburban neighborhood at night. The character walks along sidewalks, passes other pedestrians, waits at a traffic light, crosses the street with a crowd, and approaches a church with a prominent steeple. The scene features period-appropriate vehicles and street lighting.

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a quiet suburban sidewalk at night, following a pedestrian ahead. White picket fences line the left side while trees and grass verges appear on the right. Street lamps cast pools of warm light on the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching intersection with parked cars and fire hydrant

approaching crosswalk corner with traffic lights and church steeple becoming visible

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the sidewalk, passing a woman in a yellow dress and stepping briefly onto the grass. Vintage cars are parked along the street, and a church steeple becomes visible in the distance as the character approaches the intersection corner.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with crosswalk and traffic signals

segments.scene_description: The character stops at the street corner where several pedestrians are waiting. Vintage cars drive through the intersection under the traffic lights. The church building is now clearly visible across the street with its entrance illuminated.

scene_state.functional_zone: crossing intersection toward church parking lot

events.description: begins crossing the street with the group of pedestrians
light blue vintage convertible passes through the intersection as the group crosses

agents.ego_description: crossing the street alongside other pedestrians and walking toward the church entrance

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the street with the pedestrian group, moving from the sidewalk onto the asphalt crosswalk. Vintage cars continue to pass through the intersection. The character approaches the church building and its parking lot, walking alongside a woman in a white dress.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a quiet 1960s suburban neighborhood at night that culminates in the approach to a brightly lit church. It begins with the character walking along a sidewalk lined with white picket fences and warm street lamps, following a pedestrian through the stillness. As the character continues, the view expands to reveal vintage cars parked along the curb and a distant church steeple emerging against the night sky. The scene then shifts to a busy intersection where the character pauses among a group of pedestrians under the glow of traffic lights before crossing the asphalt street. Finally, the camera follows the character and a woman in a white dress as they leave the road behind and move toward the illuminated entrance and parking lot of the church.
